steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage’s strongest clue is the claim that the mutation existed long before humans began breeding dogs.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A shows the mutation in an ancestor from 53,000 years ago, which predates human breeding and directly supports the claim.
The other choices either discuss unrelated size comparisons, lack of mutation in large breeds, or overall size variation, none of which address the timing of the mutation.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
